languages.text: "Прошу не вторгаться в недоступный вашим компетенциям радиус управления. Мирянин, коим вы являетесь, не имеет достаточного уровня знания для указания расположения приоритетных поломок".

traits.locale_text: Драфт: говорит, что он не готов выполнять приказы от человека нашего уровня

languages.text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."
languages.original_text: "Прошу не вторгаться в недоступный вашим компетенциям радиус управления. Мирянин, коим вы являетесь, не имеет достаточного уровня знания для указания расположения приоритетных поломок".

traits.locale_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."
"Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."
"Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

languages.text: “请不要逾越你能力范围的管控半径。作为教外人士，你并不具备足够专业的知识来为故障事件设定优先级。”
languages.original_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

traits.locale_text: “请不要逾越你能力范围的管控半径。作为教外人士，你并不具备足够专业的知识来为故障事件设定优先级。”

languages.text: « Veuillez ne pas empiéter sur un rayon de contrôle qui dépasse vos compétences. Les profanes tels que vous ne disposent pas de connaissances suffisamment avancées pour définir la priorité des événements de dysfonctionnement. »
languages.original_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

traits.locale_text: « Veuillez ne pas empiéter sur un rayon de contrôle qui dépasse vos compétences. Les profanes tels que vous ne disposent pas de connaissances suffisamment avancées pour définir la priorité des événements de dysfonctionnement. »

languages.text: "Yetkiniz dışında yer alan kontrol yarıçapını ihlal etmeyin. Sizin gibi avamdan biri, arıza olaylarına öncelik atayacak kadar gelişmiş bir irfana sahip değildir."
languages.original_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

traits.locale_text: "Yetkiniz dışında yer alan kontrol yarıçapını ihlal etmeyin. Sizin gibi avamdan biri, arıza olaylarına öncelik atayacak kadar gelişmiş bir irfana sahip değildir."

languages.text: «Por favor, no se aproxime a un radio de control que no comprende. Como laic{mf|o|a}, no posee conocimientos suficientemente avanzados para asignar prioridades a los eventos de avería».
languages.original_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

traits.locale_text: «Por favor, no se aproxime a un radio de control que no comprende. Como laic{mf|o|a}, no posee conocimientos suficientemente avanzados para asignar prioridades a los eventos de avería».

languages.text: "Bitte wagt Euch nicht in einen Kontrollradius, der Eure Kompetenz übersteigt. {mf|Ein Laie, der|Eine Laiin, die} Ihr seid, besitzt nicht das erforderliche Wissen, um Fehlfunktionen zu priorisieren."
languages.original_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte wagt Euch nicht in einen Kontrollradius, der Eure Kompetenz übersteigt. {mf|Ein Laie, der|Eine Laiin, die} Ihr seid, besitzt nicht das erforderliche Wissen, um Fehlfunktionen zu priorisieren."

languages.text: 「あなたの能力を超えた制御半径に干渉しないでください。あなたが属する一般人は、故障発生事象に優先順位を付けるのに十分高度な知識を持っていません。」
languages.original_text: "Please do not encroach upon a control radius beyond your competence. A layperson, which you are, does not possess sufficiently advanced knowledge to assign priority to malfunction events."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの能力を超えた制御半径に干渉しないでください。あなたが属する一般人は、故障発生事象に優先順位を付けるのに十分高度な知識を持っていません。」
